meta_title: For Freelancers: API integration guide to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to API integration guide and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: API Integration Guide to Debug Code
content.seo_description: Struggling to debug complex API integrations? Learn how to leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress your clients as a freelancer.
content.answer_block: Stop manually tracing logs. By utilizing Antigravity for automated schema validation and Claude Code for real-time error resolution, you can isolate API failures in seconds. This workflow transforms debugging from a bottleneck into a repeatable, high-speed automated process, ensuring your client deliverables are always production-ready and bug-free.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank terminal at 2 AM, the API response is returning a 400, and your client is expecting a demo in six hours. We have all been there—the crushing weight of a cryptic stack trace that refuses to resolve, turning a simple integration into a multi-day nightmare. 

The good news? You don't need to be a systems architect to master this. By shifting from manual trial-and-error to AI-assisted diagnostic workflows, you can turn these roadblocks into routine fixes. This guide provides the blueprint to reclaim your time and deliver professional-grade code every single time.

steps.title: Define the API Contract
steps.description: Before debugging, you must establish what the API expects. Use Antigravity to generate a strict schema based on your endpoint documentation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this API documentation [URL] and generate a TypeScript interface and a zod validation schema for the request and response bodies.

steps.title: Instrument the Error Catching
steps.description: Inject structured logging around your fetch calls so the AI has context when things go wrong.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this fetch utility to include structured error logging that captures status codes, response headers, and request payloads for debugging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit src/utils/api.ts --instruction 'Add structured error logging to all catch blocks'

steps.title: Automated Trace Analysis
steps.description: Feed your error logs into the AI to identify patterns in the failures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze these error logs: [PASTE LOGS]. Identify the root cause of the 400 Bad Request and suggest a code fix.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal --run 'cat logs/error.log' --prompt 'Analyze this log for API integration errors'

steps.title: Test-Driven Remediation
steps.description: Generate a unit test that replicates the bug so you can verify the fix instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Vitest test case that mocks this API endpoint and triggers the failure scenario identified in the logs.

steps.title: Deploy with Confidence
steps.description: Validate the final implementation against the schema to ensure no regressions were introduced.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the updated integration code and verify it complies with the original schema requirements.

pro_tips: Always use a dedicated .env.example file so Claude Code can automatically infer your environment variables without exposing secrets.
When debugging, ask the AI to explain the 'why' behind the fix to build your own mental model for future integrations.
Use Antigravity to generate mock servers during development so you aren't hitting live rate limits while debugging.
Pipe your CLI output directly to a markdown file to keep a 'debugging diary' for your client deliverables.
Prioritize fixing the 'serialization mismatch' first; 80% of API bugs are simply data structure discrepancies.
content.next_steps: Once your integration is stable, implement an automated monitoring alert system using these same AI tools to notify you of failures before your client notices them.
content.conversion_block: Stop struggling with broken code and start shipping like a pro. With the right AI-augmented workflow, you can cut your development time in half and double your output. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
